title: pet anything
body:
### **DISCLAIMER: this mod will not get updated anymore since it's pretty buggy and there are [better alternatives](https://modrinth.com/mod/frog-petting)**
### 

pet anything*

right click to pet, hold right click to pet more

*only mobs, but if you want to pet all entities, there's a gamerule for that (petAnything)

[CURSEFORGE PAGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pet-anything)
